description: Two-stage Kalos Ghost/Grass evolution line completed in corpus. Phantump (Cosmic Eclipse 93/236) is the base-form spirit-of-a-lost-child stump; Trevenant (Fusion Strike 017/264) is its trade evolution as the adult haunted-tree whose roots tie into surrounding forest trees and give it control over them. The franchise's saddest-design benchmark on the base form (child-spirit-imitating-voices-to-lure-friends flavor) carries forward into Trevenant's looming-arboreal-guardian frame. Same Generation VI introduction (X & Y, 2013), same Kalos region origin, same Ghost/Grass typing, designer-confirmed evolution relationship.
